subject: authorization for haul & install option at austin project

emails.subject: Authorization for Haul & Install Option at Austin Project
emails.subject_base: Authorization for Haul & Install Option at Austin Project
emails.body: If it says Austin, it must be yours.... Kay Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 11/13/2000 08:52 AM From: Kathleen Clark@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT on 11/13/2000 08:04 AM

emails.subject: Re: Authorization for Haul & Install Option at Austin Project
emails.subject_base: Authorization for Haul & Install Option at Austin Project
emails.body: Re: Authorization for Haul Install Option at Austin Project Kay, This appears to be relatively simple and I know that we wanted to have ABB haul and install) but I am not at all familiar with the ABB Contract. Would you mind taking a quick look to make sure that the letter is properly drafted? Also, I wonder whether this document still needs to be signed given that the transformers are already in Austin at the site. Maybe it has already been executed. Stuart Kay Mann@ENRON 11/13/2000 08:53 AM

emails.subject: Re: Authorization for Haul & Install Option at Austin Project
